overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a neon-lit commercial storefront. The player enters through a beaded curtain, passes vending machines and an NPC, and examines a magazine rack in a gritty, industrial interior.

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a commercial storefront at night, moving toward a beaded curtain entrance flanked by glowing neon advertisements for All Foods and Sandblast products on the concrete sidewalk.

segments.scene_description: The player enters the interior through the beaded curtain, revealing a narrow commercial space with an Insta-Food vending machine and a cyberpunk terminal. An NPC in a blue shirt uses the terminal before walking away, while metal barrels are visible in the corner.

metal rack holding various cyberpunk-style magazines and publications

segments.scene_description: The player moves deeper into the dimly lit interior, passing metal barrels and turning toward a magazine display rack. A neon arrow sign illuminates the left wall while another NPC stands near a back doorway.

events.description: stopping to examine the magazine rack in close detail

agents.ego_description: closely examining the magazine covers on the display rack

entered.detail: horizontal neon light fixture above the magazine rack

segments.scene_description: The player stops to examine the magazine rack up close, revealing detailed cyberpunk magazine covers including 'Bitch' and 'Viu' under the glow of a neon tube light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, neon-lit city sidewalk into the gritty, dimly lit interior of a commercial storefront. It begins on a concrete walkway, moving past glowing advertisements for All Foods and Sandblast toward a beaded curtain entrance. As the camera passes through the curtain, the scene shifts into a narrow indoor space featuring an Insta-Food vending machine and a cyberpunk terminal where an NPC in a blue shirt is briefly seen. The camera then pushes deeper into the industrial interior, passing metal barrels and a neon arrow sign before turning toward a magazine display rack. Finally, the movement slows to a stop as the camera examines the detailed covers of magazines like Bitch and Viu under the harsh glow of a neon tube light.
